title: Waterproofing methods — overview
vo: In this section we walk through the main waterproofing methods used on site, one at a time.
onscreen_text:
Waterproofing methods
• Liquid-applied
• Sheet membrane
• Cementitious
mmd_graphics_notes: Diagram of a wall section with three labelled layers; subtle highlight as each method is named in VO.

register_cross_reference.amend_note: AMEND-K1: confirm the third method label against the approved source before lock.
